name: audits
description: Scheduled findings that open PRs/issues, deliberately capped and conservative: audit-architecture (tech-debt sweep), audit-tests (test-suite health), audit-security (vulnerable deps, committed secrets, dangerous patterns), audit-deps (dependency health: outdated, deprecated, unused, lockfile drift, licenses), audit-design-docs (validate design docs against code), and audit-product-docs (validate user-facing docs against code). Detection rules and invariants come from the repo's .claude/maintainerd.json and guidelines files.
